hooks.command:
REPO="F:/Antigravity Projeler/2d roguelite/RIMA"; STATE="$REPO/.claude/nlm_sync_state.txt"; LS=$(cat "$REPO/.claude/nlm_last_sync.txt" 2>/dev/null || echo "never"); LC=$(git -C "$REPO" log -1 --format="%cd" --date="format:%m/%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "?"); FILES=$(git -C "$REPO" status --short 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^D " | awk '{print $2}' | grep -E "\.md$" | grep -iE "(TASARIM/|MEMORY/|STAGING/|CURRENT_STATUS|CLAUDE\.md|RULES\.md|AGENTS\.md)" | while read f; do [ -f "$REPO/$f" ] || continue; ch=$(git -C "$REPO" hash-object "$REPO/$f" 2>/dev/null); sh=$(grep "^${f}|" "$STATE" 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | cut -d'|' -f2); if [ -z "$sh" ] || [ "$ch" != "$sh" ]; then echo "$f"; fi; done | head -20); HDR="[NLM] sync:${LS} | commit:${LC}"; if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | NLM_HDR="$HDR" node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const lines=d.trim().split('
').filter(Boolean); console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:process.env.NLM_HDR+'
'+lines.length+' dosya sync edilmedi → /nlm-sync:
  '+lines.join('
  ')})); });"; else NLM_HDR="$HDR | all synced" node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({systemMessage:process.env.NLM_HDR}))"; fi || true
